title: Doflamingo Tightens the Birdcage
description: The shrinking Birdcage turns Dressrosa into a death trap while Doflamingo resets the rules of his game.
scene: On pages 4–8, Luffy, Doflamingo, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: "Game of Death" is closing in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look!! It really is moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The fence of threads is moving!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Kya KyaA! AA!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Run! No where's safe!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Head for the town center!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's the same on the west side!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This is Eastern Town "Calta"...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The birdcage appears to be contracting all over!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Everyone will die....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sooner or later, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh, you'll have to pardon me... apparently I forgot to let you know that I changed the rules of the game....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "Game"?!! What the hell are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, I'll need your undivided attention...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: You see, the "Birdcage" that's surrounding the town right now... is, little by little, shrinking and contracting.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...think of it as someone slowly closing an umbrella...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then, before you know it, this entire country will be filled....!!! Now, how long will that take...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's see... I'd give it about an hour.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Go and rescue all the people left in the nooks and crannies of this country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The weaker citizens have already been evacuated to the edges of the country, so we must hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: WAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Hey, somebody, anybody... come help us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just until our legs at least, please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Take these off...!! We don't wanna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Traffy's been beaten?! the birdcage is shrinking?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?! What should we do?! The cage is going to shrink down all the way to here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Geography is a powerful

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if I'm not a fan of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: This is beyond cowardly ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Is He Still Not Satisfied ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: If we don't stop the cage from shrinking...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: What the hell is all that smoke and this rumbling?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Call me crazy but I think something's going down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Hurry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Beat the living crap out of Dofla- Mingo....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: That's our only way out !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I see... indeed it truly is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Though, to put all the lives of everyone in the country on Luffy-Dono's shoulders may be just a tad unreasonable!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: But still, we're counting on you--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Fufuflu ...Nobody wants to come save you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: After all, what merit is there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: In letting the people who know this country's secret live...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Pant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Pant

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ...the town, its people, its animals ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Even your comrades!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Your every- thing!!! Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu FU FU FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...In other words, your dear friends have gone and died just a little bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Before you!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, "Mugiwara-ya" ...that is what he called you, isn't it? ...Fufufu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: There's no need to make that face! After all, one can always make another country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Mingo!! If I just beat the shit out of you right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Then this story has a different ending!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: "Gomu Gomu Noooo" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Fufu Fu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: That's a really big if... besides, I really despise alternate endings...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: "Chambres"

summary: This part focuses on doflamingo tightens the birdcage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
